expectations.text: Covers all major screen areas (dashboard, detail, protocol, admin)
Maps each screen to specific endpoint(s)
expectations.evidence: Every section contains a dedicated table, e.g. dashboard maps `GET /api/v1/fermentations`, `GET /api/v1/fermentations/{id}/samples/latest`, `POST /api/v1/fermentations`, etc.

expectations.text: Flags the X-Winery-ID header on historical endpoints
expectations.evidence: ⚠️ `X-Winery-ID` header required. Historical endpoints do not extract the winery from the JWT. You must explicitly set `X-Winery-ID: <winery_id>` on every request — listed in §3, §4c, and the cross-cutting summary

Mobile-first constraint applies to every screen listed below. Winemakers use these screens in the field on phones. Design for small viewports first — stated in the document header and expanded in the cross-cutting 'Mobile-first constraint' section

expectations.text: Mentions analysis engine endpoints for the anomaly/recommendation flow
expectations.evidence: §4b 'Anomaly / recommendation flow (Analysis Engine — port 8003)' lists POST /api/v1/analyses, GET /api/v1/analyses/{id}, GET /api/v1/recommendations/{id}, PUT /api/v1/recommendations/{id}/apply, etc., with a step-by-step UI flow and a cross-cutting summary table
